docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $188.00 FILED BY YUEN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT GARVEY, JIM DBA EMERALD AUTO REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-18-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT UNTIL PARTY SATISFY TERMS OF MEDIATION AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES CASE WILL BE DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARVEY, JIM DBA EMERALD AUTO REPAIR
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
